title: dehaasia assamica
intro: Dehaasia assamica, also known as the Assamese Dehaasia, is a plant species native to the Himalayas, particularly in the northeastern regions of India, including Assam and parts of Nepal. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Dehaasia assamica are attributed to its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Dehaasia assamica include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
